feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP SAC IFP Capital Expense Planning
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am reaching out to seek your assistance in understanding the Capital Expense ( SAP_FI_IFP_IM_CAPEX_Planning )  planning present in SAP SAC IFP Planning. Currently, I am observing that the Plan Asset is showing an amount of 5000 for the entire 2026 period, which seems incorrect to me. As we know, the plan asset acquisition should be a one-time purchasing activity, and the amount should be reflected for that specific period only.

Additionally, I have noticed that the Plan Asset acquisition and depreciation values are the same, which again, doesn't seem right. Could someone please help me comprehend the logic behind this? I have attached a screenshot of the input forms for your reference.

Thank you in advance for your help and support. Looking forward to your insights on this matter.

cc :  @Susanne_Helbig 

Regards, Praveen.

entry.title: Setting the GeoMap information in a model
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I created a model (I use an import job with a query behind to push information in the model), where there are many dimensions but in two particular dimensions they  contain Latitudine and Longitude data, called GPSLat and GPSLong.

I'm new with GeoMap in the model, so I want to enrich a new dimension called DocNum with latitudine and longitude information. 

So, for this dimension DocNum, I have understood that I need to create two properties of type Latitudine and Longitude, I did it and I called them LatProp and LongProp

My question is: how can I link these two properties LatProp and LongProp with the model dimensions GPSLat and GPSLong ?

I cannot understand how is possible to do this association, otherwise how I can show the docnum in the map?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: Harmonization of decimal formatting in the SAC story
entry.content:
I've defined the number of decimal places in the standard SAC themes. This works correctly for values that come directly from the SAP Query. However, it does not apply to variance values.

For example, although one decimal place is defined in the SAC Standard Theme, this setting is not applied to variances displayed in the widget. SAC seems to determine the number of decimal places for variances arbitrarily — sometimes it's zero, sometimes two, and so on. You can even get different decimal formatting for two variances based on the same value. See the example below:

Is there a way to centrally control the number of decimal places for all values, including variances, at the story level?

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Previous year's total cannot be displayed in SAC reports
entry.content:
Hi Team，

Create a report that displays cumulative amounts in the SAC report.

Example:
In case of single month display April 2025 100 May 2025 100
In this cumulative display, April 2025 100 May 2025 200
I was able to display the measure for the current year without any problem,
The cumulative total for the previous year could not be produced.

Even with the attached story side limit measure.
It didn't seem to be possible to shift the previous value either.
Are there any other alternatives?

entry.title: Data Action: Copying user-submitted data to another version and lock only that user's cost center
entry.content:
Use case: Multiple users plan on the same input form but have data access restricted to their own cost centers. After planning, each user should trigger a data action that:

  1. Copies their entered values to a public version (e.g., version 'K')

  2. Locks their specific cost center so that they can no longer modify it

  3. Leaves all other users' cost centers unlocked so they can still plan and trigger their own data actions

How can I structure a data action and locking logic in SAC to support this partial locking mechanism by user and cost center?

entry.title: DataSource.setRefreshPaused API doesnt work for Calculated Measures with Script Variables
entry.content:
Hi,

I got a table with a Calculated Measure with a Script Variable (number). The Table is set to RefreshPaused(false), but it still is beeing initialized/loading from startup with a visible loading sign. If i remove the Script Variable in the Calculated Measure, the table has no loading sign. Is it possible to Paused also Calculated Measures with Script Variables completely?

thx

entry.title: Procurement: Sourcing SAC Business content installation Ariba Connection to SAC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!!

I am trying to implement the Business content -> Procurement: Sourcing , which is based on the Ariba System.

I tried to check ways to connect Ariba and SAC but then I got to know that there are no straight forward ways even though it is business content.

Can anyone please help on how to consume this standard Ariba API to SAC? 

I got to know that it can be done using CPI but unfortunately I am not able to find any direct documentations which explains this for business content.

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Script that checks if values of a measure in a table are negative
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help with a script that checks if values of a measure in a table are negative.

Let's assume my table is called Table_1 and I have a Measure, lets call it "Measure1" shown in a column in this table and a dimension "Dimension1" which members are shown in the rows of the Table.

How could a script look like that goes through each row of the Table for Measure1 and checks if a value is negative?

Ideally after the check there should be an if function, that triggers some Application Warning Message like  [Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Warning, "negative values"]  if the Measure Value is negative.

 

Thank you in advance!
Kind Regards,
Dennis

entry.title: SAC Story hierarchy Node level data change
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are fetching data from s/4 Hana and created story on Top .

we need to change values on Node or Node Level  ex: 30410, 402,30400  or top of 053.

Can this be possible ? or using any script / can some one suggest

entry.title: Replace a value in a column based a value in another column
entry.content:
Hi

is there someone that know how to replace a value in a column (AAA)  based a value of another column (BBB) ? keep in mind that I would like to substitute any valued in AAA column with (example) 1111 based a value in another .

This formula seems not working  because my column is not empty.

Replace empty with ‘NOT’ in [Product-DISPLAY_KEY] where [Invoice type-DISPLAY_KEY] is "ZFN"

Best regards

entry.title: Overwrite dimension filters in SAC Add-in with date range (operator BETWEEN)
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I want to overwrite a dimensionfilter with a date range, like [2025-05-27, 2025-04-06].

 

Example:

=SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER("Table1";"BFUBDLSOL";"[2025-05-, 2025-04-06]")

 

But that doesn't work. I couldn't find a solution for that so far.

I could only bring a range of single values to work.SAC, Add-in, filter

 

Thanks in advanced, 

Jonas

entry.title: SAC vs Tableau vs Power BI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to identify the advantages that SAC has over other leading analytics applications.

Gartner has suggested the following alternatives to SAC within the SAP Business Data Cloud. Unfortunately, I am not convinced by any official explanations of their features, so I cannot strongly recommend SAC. Tableau, Power BI and other applications also offer excellent connectivity with SAP for graphical, real-time and AI-powered analysis. I am finding it difficult to identify any significant differences. Even if we consider SAC planning as a unique function, there could be better alternatives to SAC, or just utilizing BPC.

Could you share your thoughts on what actually sets them apart based on your experience? Any thoughts would be appreciated. What should we focus on when choosing from these applications?

  • Tableau
  • Microsoft Power BI
  • Qlik Sense
  • Strategy One
  • SAP BusinessObjects BI Suite
  • Amazon QuickSight
  • Looker
  • Sisense Fusion Analytics

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Dynamic Text in Measure - Analytics Cloud - Live Data Model
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a dashboard with a Live Data Model from a SAP BW Query. In the story, I have a restricted Key Figure with an Input Date Control on Story level. In this way, I have components that show measures, filtered by CM-current month, YTM-year to month, LYTM-last year to month, YOY-year over year and so on.

Is there a way to show the actual range in the name of the measure as Dynamic Text?

It can get a bit confusing as to what is being shown in a component.

An example of an input control restricting the measure:

For greater clarity in the chart, I would like the actual time range in the name of the measure.

Or if at least I can use scripting to change the text in the Subtitle?

Also, is there a way to limit it to DECEMBER of PREVIOUS YEAR of the selected input control?

entry.title: Analytics Cloud & Business ByDesign Business Content (AP-RC-ANA-SAC) Errors in queries & import jobs
entry.content:
Hi, everyone.

I am currently trying to implement the SAP Business ByDesign business content (AP-RC-ANA-SAC) available in SAP Analytics Cloud. I am using the connector that comes with this business content (SAP_BYD_CONNECTOR), but I am having a problem with some model import jobs. Namely, the premade import jobs for models SAP__BYD_FI_ORDERPROFIT and SAP__BYD_FI_EARNEDPROFIT do not work. They provide the following error: The freehand query is not an entity set or function import" when creating a new Freehand query in SAC

 

I tried remaking the import jobs myself, by copying a query from a model. In the image below, after pressing next with this or a similar configuration, I am met with an infinite loading screen.

 

Thus, I tried making a new query. The problem is that the the tables for the two aforementioned models, RPFINPRFU30_Q0004QueryResults and RPFINPRFU30_Q0006QueryResults, are not visible in the list of tables, no matter what I do.

 

 

Do you have any advice on what I need to do in order to get access to these tables? My knowledge of ByDesign is quite limited, but the connector in SAC seems to be implemented correctly. I also should have access to Corporate Performance Analytics, since this connector does not return an authentication error.


...sapbydesign.com/sap/byd/odata/cpm_corporateperformance_analytics.svc

entry.title: Don't show null values in the chart - SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to remove null values ​​from the chart, but even applying zero suppression, it doesn't work. What is the solution for this? Is there a way to remove null values ​​and zeros when I create a chart with restricted measure?

→ The chart is waterfall 

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: I have a requirement for add multiple default value in a consumption view for a field MARA-MTART
entry.content:
I have written below code. But it is giving an error. Any idea experts.

@maheshpalavalli

entry.title: How to add public dimension into SAP Analytics Cloud Analytic Import Model?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to use a public dimension in an import analytic model. Both the master data for the public dimension and the fact data are coming from separate ABAP CDS views exposed as OData services.

These are the steps I'm following:

1) Create the public dimension and load master data into it (see images 1 and 2). The member ID is saknr from the skat table. The description is a custom category group that is required to be added for each account number record in the fact data.

image 1

image 2

2) Create an import analytic model via the "new empty model" option. The model includes the hsl (acdoca) measure, the racct (acdoca) private dimension, and the "groups" public dimension (see image 3).

image 3

3) Create an import job for the transactional data. During the mapping, it is required to map a field from the transactional data to the public dimension (see image 4). As a test, I set the default value to #.

image 4

4) After the import is complete, the "groups" column just displays the # for all the records. The expected result is that each racct record would get its corresponding category group (see image 5).

image 5

Even in the learning journey “Designing Data Models and Transforming Data in SAP Analytics Cloud” the public dimension is mapped (see image 6 from this exercise: https://learnsap.enable-now.cloud.sap/pub/mmcp/index.html?show=project!PR_6EA6A81D112ED9AC:uebung)

image 6

In my understanding, SAC would make an automatic mapping between the id field of the public dimension and the matching field of the fact data. What am I missing here?

Thanks a lot in advance!

P.S. 1: One alternative option is to combine the data sources (OData services) of the fact data and the public dimension in the modeler, but I want to understand why the public dimension isn't working for me.

P.S. 2: I've made multiple tests and followed these resources with no success:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/mapping-public-dimension-in-model-that-imports-from-sap-bw/qaq-p/12309535

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/public-dimension-in-sac/qaq-p/12406604

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/adding-a-public-dimension-to-an-existing-model/qaq-p/12751542

https://youtu.be/X7--25qTbB0

https://youtu.be/WbT-XQOH7oo

entry.title: SSO Live Connection from SAC to HANA using CIS getting error
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I tried to create a Live Connection from SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP HANA using Connection Type Direct ( I use this Type because I want to use Smart Insight Feature of SAC) and Authentication Method SAML Single Sign On (SSO). I use SAP Cloud Identity Service (CIS) as an IdP. I followed all the instructions but still can not create a Connection. I enabled the SAML in SAP HANA Studio and also mapped the External Identity (see the images below):

Then I went to SAC to create a connection:

When I hit the OK button, a pop-up appeared and redirected to the IdP log in link and I get the error:

Then I checked the Chrome Developers Tools and get the logs:

I already added the "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" in Allowed Header and Exposed Header in sap.bc.ina.service.v2 in XS Admin Tool. 
Which configs am I missing? 
Thank you experts,

Regards,

Thanh Hieu

entry.title: Not Possible to use another dimension in Account Formula
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am trying set up formula for account calculation, but I am not able to use another dimension in the formula itself. The dimension name is correct, so I am not sure what I am doing wrong. Does anyone know how to resolve the issue?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Inverse Formula planning year column
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I set up a simple inverse formula which works fine for single months. 

But I need to be able to enter values on the year column, which is greyed out. 

Which setting is responsible for this behavior? 

Kind regards,

Ismail
